headline: What's going on in today's session: S&P500 movers
summary: Stay updated with the movements of the S&P500 index in the middle of the day on Friday. Discover which stocks are leading as top gainers and losers in today's session.

headline: The Unusual Cash Offer Sitting In T Stock
summary: The market is offering an enormous cash yield to own one of America's telecom giants, forcing investors to ask if the offer is a bargain or a warning sign.
